plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Yangi boshlovchilar yoki vaqti-vaqti bilan mashq qilmoqchi bo'lganlar uchun.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: Yaqin oyda imtihonga jiddiy tayyorlanayotganlar uchun.

plans.name: Max
plans.description: Cheksiz mashq + premium GOLD materiallar bilan to'liq tayyorgarlik.

items.a: Ha. Reading, Listening va Writing mashqlari ro'yxatdan o'tgandan keyin cheksiz bepul ishlatiladi. To'lov faqat to'liq mock imtihonlar uchun.
Har bir to'liq mock imtihon (Listening + Reading + Writing) 1 kredit yeyadi. Starter — 10 / oy, Pro — 40 / oy, Max — cheksiz.
Ha, istalgan vaqtda. Bekor qilingan oydan keyin kreditlar bekor bo'ladi, lekin natijalaringiz va sertifikatlaringiz akkauntda saqlanadi.
Ha. Pro yoki Max ga istalgan vaqtda o'tishingiz mumkin — eski oydagi qoldiq kreditlar yangi tarif kreditlari ustiga qo'shiladi.

hero.title: Everything you need to ace IELTS
hero.subtitle: An end-to-end Computer-Delivered IELTS practice platform built for centers, teachers, and students.

modules.title: All 4 IELTS Modules
modules.subtitle: Practice each skill with authentic test material

items.title: Reading
items.description: Academic & General Training passages with all 13 official question types: matching headings, T/F/NG, multiple choice, sentence completion, and more.

items.title: Listening
items.description: Real-time audio with synced questions across 4 sections. Conversations, monologues, lectures — exactly like the official Cambridge format.

items.title: Writing
items.description: Task 1 (chart, graph, diagram) and Task 2 (essay) with word count tracking. Teacher feedback against the 4 official band descriptors.

items.title: Speaking (coming soon)
items.description: Browser-based audio recording with Part 1, 2, and 3 prompts. Examiner-style grading with band scores.

platform.title: Platform Capabilities
platform.subtitle: Built for education centers running real mock exams at scale

items.title: Mock Sessions
items.description: Schedule a mock exam, share a join code, and watch students take it in real time with proctor controls.

items.title: Group Management
items.description: Organize students into groups, assign teachers, and track group-level analytics.

items.title: Attendance Tracking
items.description: Mark attendance per session — Present, Absent, Late, Excused, Sick — with monthly reports.

items.title: Custom Test Builder
items.description: Centers create their own tests for Reading, Listening, and Writing — no developer needed.

items.title: Billing & Invoices
items.description: Transparent billing per mock test or monthly subscription, with downloadable invoices.

items.title: Multi-role Access
items.description: Center admin, teacher, and student roles with the right permissions for each.

cta.title: See it in action
cta.subtitle: Try a free practice test now — no signup needed.
